principles: Content is King: The UI recedes, content pops.
Micro-Interactions: Subtle feedback on every hover.
Density Control: Comfortable reading width (65ch) for docs, dense for sidebars.
Dark Mode First-Class: Not an afterthought, highly tuned contrast.

scale.mono: font-mono text-sm bg-muted/50 px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] rounded-[0.2rem]

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento' style for dashboard overview, simple list for docs.
layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.

buttons.style: h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

inputs.style: h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring

navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground transition-all group

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for subtle depth, shadow-xl for dropdowns/modals
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Active states on sidebar items. Copy code button feedback.

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple Geometric shape (e.g., Triangle or Hexagon) using SVG or Lucide Icon

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-900 on white, slate-50 on slate-950.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-2).
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (search, menu, close).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Geist Sans' via 'next/font' or Google Fonts 'Inter' if Geist is unavailable.
Implement a 'SidebarProvider' context to manage the collapsible state.
For the Document Editor, use a clean textarea or a lightweight markdown editor component (e.g., basic contenteditable or a library if permitted, otherwise simple textarea with preview).
Breadcrumbs are CRITICAL for navigation depth.
Search MUST be a modal dialog (Command Palette style) triggered by Cmd+K.
Dark mode toggle should be in the sidebar or top-right.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are present on all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
